title: Breaking the 15-Second Magic Spell: Zhixiang Future Launches the World's First Unlimited-Length Creative AI Agent vivago R1, Commercial Availability Increased to 85%
excerpt: In the summer of 2026, along the Huangpu River, the World Artificial Intelligence Conference was held as scheduled. At this event, HiDream.ai unveiled a major n
content_html:
In the summer of 2026, along the Huangpu River, the World Artificial Intelligence Conference was held as scheduled. At this event, HiDream.ai unveiled a major new product on the spotlight — vivago R1, the world's first multimodal intelligent agent with unlimited content creation duration. Alongside this release, the company also launched the Belt and Road Token Export Alliance in collaboration with institutions such as CAS Cerebro and initiated the Physical Intelligence Innovation Consortium with companies like Feijieke. The company aims to push AI from being a tool to becoming a capable intelligent partner through technological innovation and ecological collaboration.

During the conference, Mei Tao, founder and CEO of HiDream.ai, delivered a keynote speech titled "Toward World Models: Native Multimodal Driving Intelligent Agent Capabilities" at a forum hosted by the China Academy of Information and Communication Technology. He systematically outlined the trend of bidirectional advancement between large models and intelligent agents toward world models. His conclusion was clear: top-tier models have entered the realm of human genius, but a significant industrial gap remains between basic large models and real-world applications — challenges including difficulty in deployment, weak adaptability, and lack of control. Intelligent agents inherently possess self-memorization, logical planning, tool scheduling, and multi-terminal collaboration capabilities, which can translate the generation and reasoning advantages of basic models into standardized, verifiable, and deliverable industry capabilities. The combination of basic models and intelligent agents is becoming the core paradigm for AI empowering various industries.

Mei Tao further pointed out a practical dilemma: when facing complex tasks, a single intelligent agent has obvious capability limits, and it is difficult to handle cross-chain, high-precision creative tasks alone. Only by enabling multiple intelligent agents to work together like a professional team can they tackle real industry challenges. To ensure that this intelligent agent cluster operates stably, efficiently, and orderly, an intelligent agent operating system called AgentOS is essential. Therefore, HiDream developed its own HD-AgentOS, which uses a three-layer coupling architecture — resource layer, system layer, and capability layer — to support the entire industrial implementation system: the resource layer provides basic resources and atomic capabilities that intelligent agents can call, forming the execution foundation; the system layer handles full-process operations, risk control, monitoring, and security governance; the capability layer packages models, tools, knowledge, and processes into domain-specific skills. With this operating system, multi-agent collaboration can break through the limitations of solo efforts, forming a professional team that can perceive, reason, execute, and evolve.

vivago R1 is the result of this core technology and is the world's first multimodal creative intelligent agent with unlimited video generation and editing capabilities. Its launch marks a paradigm shift in AI within the creative production field — evolving from merely assisting in generating individual materials to autonomously planning, scheduling, and completing long-chain creative tasks as a smart partner. HiDream summarizes its core advantages as "long, long, and stable," precisely addressing three long-standing industry issues: limited duration, disorganized logic, and unstable performance.

The first "long" refers to unlimited duration and full-scenario adaptability without restrictions. Most mainstream AI video products are locked within 15 to 30 seconds, making them unable to meet long-term commercial creation needs. vivago R1 breaks through this time barrier, supporting continuous and coherent video generation of any length, covering all types of long-form creative scenarios such as short dramas, documentaries, brand promotions, and film productions, filling the gap in long-video creation in the industry. The second "long" refers to long-task thinking, ensuring consistent and unified creative logic. Long videos are not simply a collection of short clips; they require a complete narrative logic, a unified visual style, stable character IP, and scene settings. vivago R1 possesses long-task thinking capabilities, autonomously performing detailed logical planning, shot layout, and style calibration, effectively addressing problems such as sudden scene changes, character inconsistency, narrative gaps, and style fragmentation. The third "stable" refers to high-stability generation, enabling commercial-scale delivery. Traditional large models suffer from probabilistic output deviations, resulting in low usable rates of finished content and high enterprise debugging costs. By leveraging AgentOS's full-process scheduling and governance, vivago R1 turns the entire creation process into a controllable and adjustable workflow, raising the effective usability rate of content to 85%, far exceeding the industry average. This significantly reduces the time and labor required for repeated modifications and adjustments, allowing generated content to directly enter commercial production, brand promotion, and market delivery.

This capability particularly shines in continuous, long-chain scenarios like social media creation and commercial marketing. Even a seemingly simple storyboard generation requires not only following the script to draw scenes but also understanding cinematography language, narrative rhythm, emotional expression, and even differentiating the requirements of short video vlogs, short dramas, and product material videos. This deep industry understanding cannot be achieved by simply calling a large model API. vivago R1 uses a multi-agent collaboration mechanism to atomize and professionally schedule the entire workflow — from understanding tasks, planning storylines, creating storyboard scripts, generating core materials, to producing ultra-long videos. It integrates narrative, shots, characters, style, sound, and aesthetics organically, truly achieving the transition from a single tool to a full-chain creative system.

Beyond the product, HiDream also made two major ecological moves during WAIC. It jointly launched the Physical Intelligence Innovation Consortium Initiative with innovative enterprises and top research institutions, aiming to gather forces from industry, academia, and research to build a new industrial collaborative landscape for native multimodal world models. At the same time, HiDream formed a strategic partnership with institutions such as CAS Cerebro, signing an agreement to establish the Belt and Road Token Export Alliance. Based on the core concept of "Token without borders, AI without islands," the alliance aims to promote Chinese native multimodal AI capabilities across oceans and borders, connect global intelligent infrastructure, and help and co-build the intelligent upgrade and digital ecosystem connectivity of Belt and Road countries and regions.

At this event, HiDream.ai unveiled a major new product on the spotlight — vivago R1, the world's first multimodal intelligent agent with unlimited content creation duration. Alongside this release, the company also launched the Belt and Road Token Export Alliance in collaboration with institutions such as CAS Cerebro and initiated the Physical Intelligence Innovation Consortium with companies like Feijieke. sentences.en: In the summer of 2026, along the Huangpu River, the World Artificial Intelligence Conference was held as scheduled.
sentences.zh: 2026年夏天，黄浦江畔，世界人工智能大会如期举行。

sentences.en: At this event, HiDream.ai unveiled a major new product on the spotlight — vivago R1, the world's first multimodal intelligent agent with unlimited content creation duration.
sentences.zh: 在本次活动中，HiDream.ai重磅推出了一款重磅新品——vivago R1，全球首款无限内容创作时长的多模态智能代理。

sentences.en: Alongside this release, the company also launched the Belt and Road Token Export Alliance in collaboration with institutions such as CAS Cerebro and initiated the Physical Intelligence Innovation Consortium with companies like Feijieke.
sentences.zh: 除此次发布外，该公司还与 CAS Cerebro 等机构合作发起了“一带一路”通证出口联盟，并与斐捷科等公司发起了物理智能创新联盟。

sentences.en: The company aims to push AI from being a tool to becoming a capable intelligent partner through technological innovation and ecological collaboration.
sentences.zh: 公司旨在通过技术创新和生态协作，推动人工智能从工具变成有能力的智能伙伴。

blocks.html_en: During the conference, Mei Tao, founder and CEO of HiDream.ai, delivered a keynote speech titled "Toward World Models: Native Multimodal Driving Intelligent Agent Capabilities" at a forum hosted by the China Academy of Information and Communication Technology. He systematically outlined the trend of bidirectional advancement between large models and intelligent agents toward world models. The combination of basic models and intelligent agents is becoming the core paradigm for AI empowering various industries.

sentences.en: During the conference, Mei Tao, founder and CEO of HiDream.ai, delivered a keynote speech titled "Toward World Models: Native Multimodal Driving Intelligent Agent Capabilities" at a forum hosted by the China Academy of Information and Communication Technology.
sentences.zh: 会议期间，HiDream.ai创始人兼CEO梅涛在中国信息通信研究院主办的论坛上发表了题为“迈向世界模型：原生多模态驾驶智能代理能力”的主题演讲。

sentences.en: He systematically outlined the trend of bidirectional advancement between large models and intelligent agents toward world models.
sentences.zh: 他系统地概述了大型模型和智能体向世界模型双向推进的趋势。

sentences.en: His conclusion was clear: top-tier models have entered the realm of human genius, but a significant industrial gap remains between basic large models and real-world applications — challenges including difficulty in deployment, weak adaptability, and lack of control.
sentences.zh: 他的结论很明确：顶级模型已经进入了人类天才的境界，但基础大模型与现实应用之间仍然存在巨大的产业差距——部署困难、适应性弱、缺乏控制等挑战。

sentences.en: Intelligent agents inherently possess self-memorization, logical planning, tool scheduling, and multi-terminal collaboration capabilities, which can translate the generation and reasoning advantages of basic models into standardized, verifiable, and deliverable industry capabilities.
sentences.zh: 智能代理天生具备自记忆、逻辑规划、工具调度、多端协作能力，可以将基础模型的生成和推理优势转化为标准化、可验证、可交付的行业能力。

sentences.en: The combination of basic models and intelligent agents is becoming the core paradigm for AI empowering various industries.
sentences.zh: 基础模型与智能代理的结合正在成为人工智能赋能各行业的核心范式。

blocks.html_en: Mei Tao further pointed out a practical dilemma: when facing complex tasks, a single intelligent agent has obvious capability limits, and it is difficult to handle cross-chain, high-precision creative tasks alone. Only by enabling multiple intelligent agents to work together like a professional team can they tackle real industry challenges. With this operating system, multi-agent collaboration can break through the limitations of solo efforts, forming a professional team that can perceive, reason, execute, and evolve.

sentences.en: Mei Tao further pointed out a practical dilemma: when facing complex tasks, a single intelligent agent has obvious capability limits, and it is difficult to handle cross-chain, high-precision creative tasks alone.
sentences.zh: 梅涛进一步指出了一个现实困境：面对复杂任务时，单个智能体能力限制明显，难以单独处理跨链、高精度的创意任务。

sentences.en: Only by enabling multiple intelligent agents to work together like a professional team can they tackle real industry challenges.
sentences.zh: 只有让多个智能代理像专业团队一样协同工作，才能应对真正的行业挑战。

sentences.en: To ensure that this intelligent agent cluster operates stably, efficiently, and orderly, an intelligent agent operating system called AgentOS is essential.
sentences.zh: 为了保证这个智能代理集群稳定、高效、有序地运行，一个名为AgentOS的智能代理操作系统是必不可少的。

sentences.en: Therefore, HiDream developed its own HD-AgentOS, which uses a three-layer coupling architecture — resource layer, system layer, and capability layer — to support the entire industrial implementation system: the resource layer provides basic resources and atomic capabilities that intelligent agents can call, forming the execution foundation; the system layer handles full-process operations, risk control, monitoring, and security governance; the capability layer packages models, tools, knowledge, and processes into domain-specific skills.
sentences.zh: 因此，HiDream开发了自己的HD-AgentOS，采用资源层、系统层、能力层三层耦合架构来支撑整个工业实现体系：资源层提供智能代理可以调用​​的基础资源和原子能力，形成执行基础；系统层负责全流程运营、风险控制、监控和安全治理；能力层将模型、工具、知识和流程打包成特定领域的技能。

sentences.en: With this operating system, multi-agent collaboration can break through the limitations of solo efforts, forming a professional team that can perceive, reason, execute, and evolve.
sentences.zh: 通过这个操作系统，多智能体协作可以突破单独努力的局限性，形成一个可以感知、推理、执行和进化的专业团队。

sentences.zh: vivago R1就是这一核心技术的成果，是全球首款具有无限视频生成和编辑能力的多模态创意智能代理。

sentences.en: HiDream summarizes its core advantages as "long, long, and stable," precisely addressing three long-standing industry issues: limited duration, disorganized logic, and unstable performance.
sentences.zh: HiDream将其核心优势概括为“长、长、稳”，精准解决了行业长期存在的三大问题：时长有限、逻辑混乱、性能不稳定。

Traditional large models suffer from probabilistic output deviations, resulting in low usable rates of finished content and high enterprise debugging costs. By leveraging AgentOS's full-process scheduling and governance, vivago R1 turns the entire creation process into a controllable and adjustable workflow, raising the effective usability rate of content to 85%, far exceeding the industry average. This significantly reduces the time and labor required for repeated modifications and adjustments, allowing generated content to directly enter commercial production, brand promotion, and market delivery.

sentences.zh: 第一个“长”是指无限时长、无限制的全场景适应性。

sentences.en: Most mainstream AI video products are locked within 15 to 30 seconds, making them unable to meet long-term commercial creation needs.
sentences.zh: 主流AI视频产品大多锁定在15秒至30秒内，无法满足长期的商业创作需求。

sentences.zh: 第二个“长”是指长任务思维，保证创作逻辑的连贯统一。

sentences.en: The third "stable" refers to high-stability generation, enabling commercial-scale delivery.
sentences.zh: 第三个“稳”是指高稳定发电，实现商业规模交付。

sentences.en: Traditional large models suffer from probabilistic output deviations, resulting in low usable rates of finished content and high enterprise debugging costs.
sentences.zh: 传统大型模型存在概率输出偏差，导致成品内容可用率低、企业调试成本高。

sentences.en: By leveraging AgentOS's full-process scheduling and governance, vivago R1 turns the entire creation process into a controllable and adjustable workflow, raising the effective usability rate of content to 85%, far exceeding the industry average.
sentences.zh: 通过AgentOS的全流程调度治理，vivago R1将整个创作流程变成可控可调整的工作流程，将内容有效可用率提升至85%，远超行业平均水平。

sentences.en: This significantly reduces the time and labor required for repeated modifications and adjustments, allowing generated content to directly enter commercial production, brand promotion, and market delivery.
sentences.zh: 这大大减少了反复修改和调整所需的时间和人力，使生成的内容可以直接进入商业生产、品牌推广和市场交付。

sentences.en: Even a seemingly simple storyboard generation requires not only following the script to draw scenes but also understanding cinematography language, narrative rhythm, emotional expression, and even differentiating the requirements of short video vlogs, short dramas, and product material videos.
sentences.zh: 即使是看似简单的分镜板生成，也不仅需要按照剧本绘制场景，还需要理解电影摄影语言、叙事节奏、情感表达，甚至需要区分短视频vlog、短剧、产品素材视频的要求。

sentences.en: This deep industry understanding cannot be achieved by simply calling a large model API.
sentences.zh: 这种对行业的深刻理解不是简单调用大模型API就能实现的。

sentences.zh: vivago R1采用多智能体协作机制，对整个工作流程进行原子化和专业调度——从理解任务、规划故事情节、创建故事板脚本、生成核心素材，到制作超长视频。

sentences.en: It integrates narrative, shots, characters, style, sound, and aesthetics organically, truly achieving the transition from a single tool to a full-chain creative system.
sentences.zh: 它将叙事、镜头、人物、风格、声音、美学有机地融合在一起，真正实现了从单一工具到全链条创作体系的转变。

sentences.zh: 除了产品之外，HiDream在WAIC期间还做出了两大生态举措。

sentences.en: It jointly launched the Physical Intelligence Innovation Consortium Initiative with innovative enterprises and top research institutions, aiming to gather forces from industry, academia, and research to build a new industrial collaborative landscape for native multimodal world models.
sentences.zh: 联合创新企业和顶尖研究机构共同发起物理智能创新联盟计划，旨在汇聚产学研力量，构建本土多式联运世界模型的产业协同新格局。

sentences.en: At the same time, HiDream formed a strategic partnership with institutions such as CAS Cerebro, signing an agreement to establish the Belt and Road Token Export Alliance.
sentences.zh: 同时，HiDream与CAS Cerebro等机构结成战略合作伙伴，签署协议成立一带一路通证出口联盟。

sentences.en: Based on the core concept of "Token without borders, AI without islands," the alliance aims to promote Chinese native multimodal AI capabilities across oceans and borders, connect global intelligent infrastructure, and help and co-build the intelligent upgrade and digital ecosystem connectivity of Belt and Road countries and regions.
sentences.zh: 该联盟以“Token无国界，AI无岛屿”为核心理念，旨在跨洋无国界推广中国本土多式联运人工智能能力，连接全球智能基础设施，助力共建“一带一路”国家和地区的智能化升级和数字生态互联互通。

content_html_zh:
2026年夏天，黄浦江畔，世界人工智能大会如期举行。 在本次活动中，HiDream.ai重磅推出了一款重磅新品——vivago R1，全球首款无限内容创作时长的多模态智能代理。 除此次发布外，该公司还与 CAS Cerebro 等机构合作发起了“一带一路”通证出口联盟，并与斐捷科等公司发起了物理智能创新联盟。 公司旨在通过技术创新和生态协作，推动人工智能从工具变成有能力的智能伙伴。

会议期间，HiDream.ai创始人兼CEO梅涛在中国信息通信研究院主办的论坛上发表了题为“迈向世界模型：原生多模态驾驶智能代理能力”的主题演讲。 他系统地概述了大型模型和智能体向世界模型双向推进的趋势。 他的结论很明确：顶级模型已经进入了人类天才的境界，但基础大模型与现实应用之间仍然存在巨大的产业差距——部署困难、适应性弱、缺乏控制等挑战。 智能代理天生具备自记忆、逻辑规划、工具调度、多端协作能力，可以将基础模型的生成和推理优势转化为标准化、可验证、可交付的行业能力。 基础模型与智能代理的结合正在成为人工智能赋能各行业的核心范式。

梅涛进一步指出了一个现实困境：面对复杂任务时，单个智能体能力限制明显，难以单独处理跨链、高精度的创意任务。 只有让多个智能代理像专业团队一样协同工作，才能应对真正的行业挑战。 为了保证这个智能代理集群稳定、高效、有序地运行，一个名为AgentOS的智能代理操作系统是必不可少的。 因此，HiDream开发了自己的HD-AgentOS，采用资源层、系统层、能力层三层耦合架构来支撑整个工业实现体系：资源层提供智能代理可以调用​​的基础资源和原子能力，形成执行基础；系统层负责全流程运营、风险控制、监控和安全治理；能力层将模型、工具、知识和流程打包成特定领域的技能。 通过这个操作系统，多智能体协作可以突破单独努力的局限性，形成一个可以感知、推理、执行和进化的专业团队。

vivago R1就是这一核心技术的成果，是全球首款具有无限视频生成和编辑能力的多模态创意智能代理。 它的推出标志着人工智能在创意制作领域的范式转变——从仅仅协助生成单个素材，发展到作为智能合作伙伴自主规划、调度和完成长链创意任务。 HiDream将其核心优势概括为“长、长、稳”，精准解决了行业长期存在的三大问题：时长有限、逻辑混乱、性能不稳定。

第一个“长”是指无限时长、无限制的全场景适应性。 主流AI视频产品大多锁定在15秒至30秒内，无法满足长期的商业创作需求。 vivago R1突破了这一时间障碍，支持任意长度的连续连贯视频生成，覆盖短剧、纪录片、品牌宣传、电影制作等各类长视频创作场景，填补了行业长视频创作的空白。 第二个“长”是指长任务思维，保证创作逻辑的连贯统一。 长视频不仅仅是短片的集合；它们需要完整的叙事逻辑、统一的视觉风格、稳定的角色IP和场景设置。 vivago R1具备长任务思维能力，自主进行详细的逻辑规划、镜头布局、风格校准，有效解决场景突变、人物不一致、叙事断层、风格碎片化等问题。 第三个“稳”是指高稳定发电，实现商业规模交付。 传统大型模型存在概率输出偏差，导致成品内容可用率低、企业调试成本高。 通过AgentOS的全流程调度治理，vivago R1将整个创作流程变成可控可调整的工作流程，将内容有效可用率提升至85%，远超行业平均水平。 这大大减少了反复修改和调整所需的时间和人力，使生成的内容可以直接进入商业生产、品牌推广和市场交付。

这种能力在社交媒体创作、商业营销等持续、长链的场景中尤其闪耀。 即使是看似简单的分镜板生成，也不仅需要按照剧本绘制场景，还需要理解电影摄影语言、叙事节奏、情感表达，甚至需要区分短视频vlog、短剧、产品素材视频的要求。 这种对行业的深刻理解不是简单调用大模型API就能实现的。 vivago R1采用多智能体协作机制，对整个工作流程进行原子化和专业调度——从理解任务、规划故事情节、创建故事板脚本、生成核心素材，到制作超长视频。 它将叙事、镜头、人物、风格、声音、美学有机地融合在一起，真正实现了从单一工具到全链条创作体系的转变。

除了产品之外，HiDream在WAIC期间还做出了两大生态举措。 联合创新企业和顶尖研究机构共同发起物理智能创新联盟计划，旨在汇聚产学研力量，构建本土多式联运世界模型的产业协同新格局。 同时，HiDream与CAS Cerebro等机构结成战略合作伙伴，签署协议成立一带一路通证出口联盟。 该联盟以“Token无国界，AI无岛屿”为核心理念，旨在跨洋无国界推广中国本土多式联运人工智能能力，连接全球智能基础设施，助力共建“一带一路”国家和地区的智能化升级和数字生态互联互通。
